assertions.title: Semester grid renders after plan generation

steps.expected: Landing page loads with hero and CTA
steps.observed: Landing page loaded successfully with Get Started button

steps.action: Click Get Started to navigate to signup
steps.observed: Signup form with email and password fields displayed

steps.action: Fill signup form with unique test email
steps.observed: Email and password fields filled successfully

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard
steps.observed: Redirected to dashboard showing authenticated state
Successfully navigated to /plan/new with chat interface and welcome message

steps.action: Send message requesting transfer plan for SMC → UCLA CS
steps.expected: AI responds with semester grid showing courses organized by semester
steps.observed: AI returned rate limit error: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'

evidence.network: N/A - blocked by rate limit before API response

assertions.issues: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded (50 req/day on free tier). Unable to generate plan to test semester grid rendering.

assertions.title: Semester and overall unit totals displayed

steps.action: Attempt to generate plan for SMC → UCLA CS
steps.expected: Plan generates with unit totals per semester and overall
steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 dependency. Cannot verify unit totals without successful plan generation.

assertions.title: Plan shows prerequisite information

steps.action: Attempt to generate plan for SMC → UCLA CS
steps.expected: Plan generates with prerequisite information for courses
steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 dependency. Cannot verify prerequisite display without successful plan generation.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (50 req/day) prevents testing plan generation assertions. Rate limit error appears immediately after sending message.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded. The free tier allows 50 requests per day and 20 requests per minute. All plan generation assertions require a successful AI response to generate the semester grid.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30 seconds between requests, still rate limited. The daily quota appears to be exhausted.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. All assertions blocked by OpenRouter API rate limit (50 req/day free tier exhausted). Auth flow works correctly (signup → dashboard → plan/new), chat interface loads with welcome message, but AI plan generation cannot complete due to external API constraints.
